about.title: Creating Moments,
about.desc: VibeNests is Bachupally's premier private luxury suite destination — where every celebration is curated with elegance, warmth, and an unwavering commitment to perfection.
about.storyTitle: Born from a Passion for Celebrations
about.storyDesc1: VibeNests was founded with a simple yet powerful belief — that every celebration, big or small, deserves a space that feels truly special.
about.storyDesc2: From birthdays to anniversaries, proposals to surprise parties — we've built suites that transform ordinary moments into extraordinary memories.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To craft unforgettable celebration experiences in private luxury suites, making every milestone feel extraordinary and deeply personal.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To become India's most trusted luxury micro-venue brand, redefining how people celebrate life's most precious moments.

values.title: Our Values
values.desc: Privacy, elegance, personalization, and excellence. We believe every celebration deserves a flawless, curated experience.

contact.tag: WE'D LOVE TO HEAR FROM YOU
contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.desc: Have a question or want to book a celebration? Reach out to us and we'll get back to you shortly.

trend.title: Why Private Celebration Suites Are Becoming the New Trend
trend.excerpt: In recent years, private celebration suites have emerged as a popular alternative to crowded restaurants and banquet halls.
trend.content1: Celebrations are some of life's most treasured moments. Whether it's a birthday, anniversary, proposal, baby shower, or a simple gathering with loved ones, everyone wants their special occasion to feel unique and memorable.
trend.content2: In recent years, private celebration suites have emerged as a popular alternative to crowded restaurants, banquet halls, and public venues. People are increasingly looking for intimate spaces where they can celebrate comfortably with family and friends without interruptions.
trend.content3: One of the biggest advantages of a private suite is exclusivity. Instead of sharing a venue with multiple events or dealing with noisy surroundings, you have a dedicated space designed entirely for your celebration.
trend.content4: Privacy is another major reason behind the growing popularity of private suites. Couples celebrating anniversaries, families hosting baby showers, or individuals planning surprise proposals often prefer a setting where they can focus on the occasion without distractions.
trend.content5: Modern private suites also offer customized experiences. From decorations and personalized themes to cakes, photography, music, and live streaming options, every detail can be tailored according to individual preferences.
trend.content6: Vibenests believes every celebration deserves a beautiful space and a memorable experience. Because special moments should be celebrated exactly the way you imagine them.

stress.title: How to Plan a Perfect Birthday Celebration Without the Stress
stress.excerpt: Planning a birthday celebration can be exciting but overwhelming. Here's a practical guide to organizing a beautiful, stress-free birthday.
stress.content1: Planning a birthday celebration can be exciting, but it often comes with a long list of responsibilities. Choosing a venue, arranging decorations, ordering food, managing guests, and coordinating schedules can quickly become overwhelming.
stress.content2: The good news is that a well-planned birthday doesn't have to be stressful.
stress.content3: The first step is deciding the type of celebration you want. Some people prefer a quiet gathering with close family members, while others enjoy larger parties with friends and colleagues.
stress.content4: Next, select a venue that matches the mood of the event. A private suite offers flexibility, comfort, and privacy while providing enough space for decorations, entertainment, and dining.
stress.content5: Decorations play a significant role in setting the atmosphere. Whether you prefer elegant floral arrangements, vibrant balloons, themed décor, or customized backdrops, planning these elements helps create a visually appealing experience.
stress.content6: Most importantly, remember that birthdays are about spending quality time with people who matter. With proper planning and the right venue, birthdays can be both beautiful and stress-free.

distance.title: Celebrating Together, Even When Miles Apart
distance.excerpt: Distance should never prevent loved ones from being part of life's important moments. Discover how live celebration features are bringing families together.
distance.content1: In today's world, families and friends are often spread across different cities, countries, and time zones. While distance can make physical gatherings difficult, it should never prevent loved ones from being part of life's important moments.
distance.content2: Technology has transformed the way we celebrate. From birthdays and anniversaries to baby showers and family milestones, virtual participation has become a meaningful way to stay connected.
distance.content3: Imagine celebrating an anniversary while your parents watch from another city, or cutting a birthday cake while friends from abroad join in real time.
distance.content4: Live celebration features have become increasingly popular because they combine the intimacy of a private event with the convenience of virtual participation.
distance.content5: Vibenests understands that every celebration is about people, relationships, and memories. That's why our Live Celebration feature helps bring families and friends together, no matter where they are in the world.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.supportAvail: Our support team is available 9 AM – 9 PM IST, every day.

booking.a1: Vibenests is a premium private luxury suite booking platform where you can celebrate birthdays, anniversaries, proposals, baby showers, corporate gatherings, and other special occasions in beautifully curated private spaces.
booking.q2: How do I book a suite?
booking.a2: Simply: Select your occasion → Choose a suite → Pick your date and time → Add decorations or add-ons → Complete payment → Receive instant booking confirmation.
booking.q3: How far in advance can I book?
booking.a3: Bookings can be made up to 60 days in advance, subject to availability.
booking.q4: Can I modify my booking after confirmation?
booking.a4: Yes. Booking modifications are allowed based on availability and the modification policy applicable to your booking.
booking.a5: Yes. Rescheduling is permitted according to the cancellation and rescheduling policy.

suites.q1: What types of suites are available?
suites.a1: We offer suites designed for: Birthdays, Anniversaries, Romantic Dinners, Proposals, Baby Showers, Family Gatherings, and Corporate Events.
suites.q2: How many guests can a suite accommodate?
suites.a2: Each suite has its own capacity. Capacities typically range from 2 guests to 50+ guests, depending on the suite selected.
suites.a3: Food and beverages depend on the selected package. Additional catering options may also be available.
suites.a4: Amenities may include: Air Conditioning, Wi-Fi, Smart TV, Music System, Private Dining Area, Projector & Screen, Mood Lighting, and Live Streaming Setup.

addons.a1: Popular add-ons include: Cakes, Balloon Decoration, Floral Decoration, Photography, Videography, DJ Services, Live Music, Custom Backdrops, and Welcome Boards.
addons.q2: Can I order a customized cake?
addons.a2: Yes. Customized cakes can be requested while booking.
addons.q3: Can I bring my own decorations?
addons.a3: This depends on venue policies. Please contact support before bringing external decorations.

payments.a1: We accept: UPI, Credit Cards, Debit Cards, and Net Banking.
payments.a2: Yes. Payments are processed through secure payment gateways using encrypted transactions.

refunds.a1: Yes. Bookings can be cancelled according to the cancellation policy.
refunds.q2: When will I receive my refund?
refunds.a2: Approved refunds are typically processed within 7–10 business days.

support.q1: How can I contact customer support?
support.a2: Support is available daily from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM IST.

step1.title: Choose Occasion

step2.title: Select Your Suite

step3.title: Customize & Add-ons

step4.title: Confirm & Pay

step5.title: Share & Invite

step6.title: Celebrate & Enjoy

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.p1: Vibenests Private Luxury Suites ("Vibenests", "we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy and personal data.
intro.p2: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, process, and protect your personal information when you use our website, mobile application, and services.

collect.title: 2. Information We Collect
collect.p4: Payments are processed through authorized payment gateways. Vibenests does not store:

live.title: 3. Live Celebration Feature
live.li1: Meeting links may be generated through approved platforms.
live.li2: Guests joining through shared links are responsible for their own conduct.
live.li3: Users must obtain consent before sharing personal images or videos of others.
live.li4: Vibenests does not monitor private conversations conducted through third-party meeting platforms.

consent.title: 5. Consent
consent.li1: By using our services, you consent to the collection and processing of your personal data.
consent.li2: You may withdraw consent at any time by contacting us.
consent.li3: Withdrawal of consent may affect service availability.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.p1: We retain data only as long as necessary for:
retention.p2: Thereafter, data will be securely deleted or anonymized.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights Under DPDP Act
rights.li5: Nominate another individual to exercise rights on your behalf

thirdParty.title: 9. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.p2: Such providers process data according to their own privacy policies.

children.title: 10. Children's Privacy
children.li1: Our services are intended for individuals aged 18 years and above.
children.li2: We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

grievance.title: 11. Grievance Officer
grievance.p1: For privacy-related concerns, data access requests, or DPDP Act grievances, please contact:
grievance.timeline: Response Timeline: Acknowledge within 7 business days, resolve within 30 business days.

updates.title: 12. Policy Updates
updates.li1: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically.
updates.li2: Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance
acceptance.p1: By accessing or using Vibenests, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please discontinue use immediately.

responsibilities.title: 3. User Responsibilities
responsibilities.li5: Do not engage in illegal activities

booking.title: 4. Booking Rules
booking.p2: Availability is subject to change until confirmation.

conduct.title: 5. Guest Conduct
conduct.p2: Vibenests reserves the right to terminate bookings for misconduct.

live.title: 6. Live Celebration Sharing
live.p1: Users may share meeting links with relatives and friends. Users are solely responsible for:
live.p2: Vibenests is not responsible for the actions of third-party streaming providers.

pricing.title: 7. Pricing
pricing.p2: Applicable taxes shall be displayed before checkout.

ip.title: 9. Intellectual Property
ip.p2: belongs to Vibenests and may not be copied without authorization.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: Vibenests shall not be liable for:

termination.title: 11. Suspension & Termination
termination.p1: We may suspend or terminate accounts for:

law.title: 12. Governing Law
law.p1: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of courts located in Hyderabad, Telangana.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p1: For any questions regarding these Terms of Use, bookings, services, complaints, or legal matters, please contact:

addons.title: 3. Add-on Refunds
addons.p1: Unused add-ons may be refunded if cancellation occurs before preparation begins.
addons.p3: Once preparation starts, refunds are not available.

reschedule.title: 4. Rescheduling
reschedule.p1: Users may request one free reschedule, subject to:
reschedule.li2: Request submitted at least 48 hours before booking

force.title: 5. Force Majeure
force.p1: In situations beyond reasonable control, including:

processing.title: 6. Refund Processing Time
processing.p1: Approved refunds will generally be processed within:

failed.title: 7. Failed Transactions
failed.p1: If money is debited but the booking is not confirmed:
failed.li2: Eligible refunds will be processed within 5–7 business days.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.note: All approved refunds will be processed to the original payment method used during booking.
